data.title: Trump Tariff Turmoil Hits ValueAct's Amazon Stake, But Well-Timed Salesforce Sell Pays Off
data.description: ValueAct Holdings, L.P. initiated a position in Amazon.com Inc. in the fourth quarter of 2024, purchasing 536,900 shares worth approximately $122 million, according to a 13F-HR filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on Feb. 14.

data.title: BlackRock Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
Dow Tumbles Over 1,000 Points As Nvidia, Apple And Tesla Decline: Greed Index Remains In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
Hollywood Becomes Collateral Damage In Trump Tariff War As China Slashes Film Imports, Says US Actions Will Inevitably Reduce 'Favorability' Towards American Films
data.description: China announced on Thursday it would immediately restrict Hollywood film imports in retaliation for President Trump's tariff increases.

data.title: Xi Jinping Says 'There Are No Winners In Tariff War' As China Slaps 125% Tariffs On US Goods, Urges Trump To Immediately Correct 'Wrongdoings'
data.description: In the ongoing trade war, China has significantly increased tariffs on U.S. goods from 84% to an unprecedented 125%. This move comes as a countermeasure to the Trump administration's similar actions.
